category_sources: Official repository describes a set of tools to manage objects on PKCS#11 cryptographic tokens.
source_facts.description: Tools to manage objects on PKCS#11 crypotographic tokens.
docs_sources: Official README points to docs/INSTALL.md for installation instructions.
Official README points to docs/MANUAL.md for instructions and how-to guide.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Mastercard/pkcs11-tools, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official repository states compatibility with HSM brands, NSS, and softoken.
source_facts.description identifies PKCS#11 cryptographic token object management.
